_comment: ICE CCF-01 Phase 1 governed hook wiring (cc-0026). All guards are wired in --log-only (dry-run) mode; none is enforcing. Bootstrap is inform-only (SessionStart, no enforcing mode). This file is committed/governed; the existing sql-content-gate wiring stays in settings.local.json and is intentionally NOT duplicated here. Enforcing flips happen one guard at a time, each behind a PK gate, after >=3 clean dry-run sessions per guard (cc-0026 §D).
_permissions_comment: READ-ONLY allowances only. Deliberately absent: mcp__supabase__execute_sql (stays in settings.local.json `ask` — the same tool serves SELECT and DML, and permission matching cannot distinguish them; allowing it would punch a hole through the apply_migration/deploy_edge_function hard stops). Also absent: mcp__ccd_session_mgmt__send_message (the harness always prompts for it by design; it cannot be allowlisted). Every entry below is non-mutating.
